reviews.review_description: This is very indulging and Hilarious. It has very cool mechanics and will keep wanting more the whole time

This game is funny, smart,and just plain fun. The only thing I wish was different was that the game was longer. The four chapters and arcade game are all fun and creative in there own ways but it goes by REALLY FAST.
Really fun and challenging great soundtracks and comes with bat batty bats
There were no glitches and the controls worked great. Works great on oculus go
This is one of the best games I've played on Oculus Go. Nice graphics and simple but challenging gameplay and puzzles.

This game is a cartoon style puzzle game but done through an immersive storyline. Excellent graphics and easy to use controls.   If you get stuck on what to do next the game will give you more specific clues on how to proceed and if you’re really stuck there are hints available. As others have said, the voice actors are hilarious. Two endings. Absolutely worth the cost and fun to play.

Just brought this game and completed the first elevator!!!I i was unsure if my VR unit was a fad/impulse buy or a legitimate purchase and after playing this title I really really hope Devs keep supporting Virtual reality. 
Graphics and production dont have to be red dead redemption quality when you have a little £2.29 gem like this and I am loving playing it. Well done guys and please keep up the great work. I'm 45,been a gamer all my life and playing this title has been one of those pinochle moments of my hobby that made me go wow.

developer_response.body: Wow! Thanks for this great review. We were really touched by this. Thanks for taking the plunge into VR!

reviews.review_description: This game is funny as hell😂😂 I love bat Batty bats British bulldog bonus makes me think of my doggies🐶 10 out of 10 awesome
I recently purchased this game and I love it! It has a very funny story and is a great puzzle game. The voices are perfect, and the humor in this game is hilarious. A great game for teens.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words. Super stoked you enjoyed the space adventure so much. Glad you you think it's a great game for Teens. The ESRB thought so too.

reviews.review_description:
One of the ingame collectible soundtrack songs, W-Crew - Max Detroit, is straight-up transphobic. If you understand german it's not even subtle. The song text contains the clichéd and toxic narrative of being tricked into sex with a trans woman and lines like "she is all man." make it pretty clear where the artist stands.

It's pretty upsetting to suddenly have stuff like that blasting from your speakers, during what otherwise was just a silly, lighthearted game. 

I advise you not to give money to a company that provides bigots with a platform.
Fun game
Good game cool stuff and just fun

I love this kind of humor.  the game is great.  I really enjoyed it.  I laughed a lot.  play time around 3 hours.  I would welcome more lifts or rooms.  well done work.  I hope you will continue this kind of games. Thank you.

Took a few minutes to get into the story and controls, but man was this a FUN game! Surprisingly funny especially as the story progressed. Looking forward to more games from this dev team! Thanks for the ride!
LOL LOL this is the best game I played jet with the funnyest  and amazing story and game play 10/10.

This game is amazing. It’s funny and the puzzles are the perfect difficulty. I’ve only played two levels and I am already obsessed. The controls were perfect (at least on the oculus go) and I loved how much there was to interact with. The people that made this should definitely make a sequel. If you don’t buy this game than you have a problem.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review. A sequel one day would be lovely. Vida and Roccmeier have more stories to tell ;-D

reviews.review_description: It was one of the best very games I have played on the oculus and it has great story and a decent play time

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We appreciate your kind words.

reviews.review_description: I was a little bummed to find that Rick and Morty was not available on the GO but after watching reviews online, I found this game to have similar humor and crazy scenarios close to my previous VIVE experience with R&M. Tons of laughs, great controls and you never lose focus of the objectives that are laid out in black and white. Seriously, the voice actor is great and elevates this game to a whole new level in immersion. Can't wait for a sequel.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review. Glad you found the right kind of silliness you were looking for.

reviews.review_description: I loved how they put old games into this game! It was a hilarious game with lots of action and fun. I would definitely redo the story again, it’s about 5 hours long, and if I were you, I’d get it now!!! Thanks for doing an amazing job developers!!!🙂🙂🙂🙂🙂🙂
This game is really good for peaple that just started vr
